combined_text: This Map Shows The Biggest Shipping Ports In The World, And How Most Of Them Are Clustered In The Same Area This Map Shows The Biggest Shipping Ports In The World, And How Most Of Them Are Clustered In The Same Area Max Nisen Nov. 13, 2013, 11:01 AM 16,095A surprising earlier map from Seth Kadish at Vizual Statistix showed that none of the world's busiest flight paths by passenger volume so much as touch
